response.justification: The candidate has nearly two decades of hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, plus genuine entrepreneurial experience founding and sustaining an open-source geo-data platform. However, the role is a director-level AI strategy position requiring recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI-built products; the resume shows only recent, briefly-described AI-agent tooling work and no evidence of engineering leadership at strategic scope, advising customers, or shaping product direction across organizations. The career trajectory is strong senior/staff IC delivery work, which falls well short of the principal/strategy profile sought.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience spanning backend, frontend, mobile, embedded, and low-latency systems
Entrepreneurial track record: founded and maintains an open-source GIS platform used in production by a real organization
Strong craftsmanship and knowledge-sharing habits: TDD, CI/CD, open-source libraries, workshops, and conference talks
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise beyond brief recent mention of MCP tooling
No evidence of director-level scope: no strategy setting, customer/partner advisory, or cross-org technical leadership
Cloud experience appears limited to application-level usage rather than cloud platform strategy or architecture leadership

key_factors.factor: Lack of demonstrated AI expertise and AI-built products
Long, broad engineering experience with entrepreneurial initiative
